setting: Two friends, Tom and Sarah, are catching up at a cafe, discussing Tom's recent breakup.
lyrics:
For all the times that you rained on my parade
And all the clubs you get in using my name
You think you broke my heart, oh girl for goodness sake!
You think I'm crying on my own, well I ain't

And I didn't wanna write a song
'Cause I didn't want anyone thinking I still care
I don't but, you still hit my phone up
And baby I'll be movin' on
And I think it should be somethin'
That I don't wanna hold back
Maybe you should know that

My mama don't like you and she likes everyone
And I never like to admit that I was wrong
And I've been so caught up in my job,
Didn't see what's going on
But now I know, I'm better sleeping on my own

'Cause if you like the way you look that much
Oh baby you should go and love yourself
And if you think that I'm still holdin' on to somethin'
You should go and love yourself

But when you told me that you hated my friends
The only problem was with you and not them
And every time you told me my opinion was wrong
And tried to make me forget where I came from

And I didn't wanna write a song
'Cause I didn't want anyone thinking I still care
I don't but, you still hit my phone up
And baby I'll be movin' on
And I think it should be somethin'
That I don't wanna hold back
Maybe you should know that

My mama don't like you and she likes everyone
And I never like to admit that I was wrong
And I've been so caught up in my job
Didn't see what's going on
And now I know, I'm better sleeping on my own

'Cause if you like the way you look that much
Oh baby you should go and love yourself
And if you think that I'm still holdin' on to somethin'
You should go and love yourself

For all the times that you made me feel small
I fell in love, now I feel nothin' at all
I never felt so low when I was vulnerable
Was I a fool to let you break down my walls?

'Cause if you like the way you look that much
Oh baby you should go and love yourself
And if you think that I'm still holdin' on to somethin'
You should go and love yourself

'Cause if you like the way you look that much
Oh baby you should go and love yourself
And if you think that I'm still holdin' on to somethin'
You should go and love yourself

lyricsJa.en: For all the times that you rained on my parade
lyricsJa.ja: 君が僕の邪魔をしてばかりいた時のことも

lyricsJa.en: And all the clubs you get in using my name
lyricsJa.ja: 僕の名前を使ってクラブに入り浸っていたことも

lyricsJa.en: You think you broke my heart, oh girl for goodness sake!
lyricsJa.ja: 僕を傷つけたと思っているんだろうけど、勘弁してくれよ

lyricsJa.en: You think I'm crying on my own, well I ain't
lyricsJa.ja: 一人で泣いていると思っているなら、それは大間違いだ

lyricsJa.en: And I didn't wanna write a song
lyricsJa.ja: 本当は歌なんて書きたくなかったんだ

lyricsJa.en: 'Cause I didn't want anyone thinking I still care
lyricsJa.ja: まだ君に未練があるなんて、誰にも思われたくないから

lyricsJa.en: I don't but, you still hit my phone up
lyricsJa.ja: そんなことないのに、君はまだ僕に電話してくるね

lyricsJa.en: And baby I'll be movin' on
lyricsJa.ja: だけど僕はもう、次へ進むことにしたんだ

lyricsJa.en: And I think it should be somethin'
lyricsJa.ja: これは伝えておくべきことだと思う

lyricsJa.en: That I don't wanna hold back
lyricsJa.ja: 隠さずにいたいから

lyricsJa.en: Maybe you should know that
lyricsJa.ja: 君も知っておいた方がいい

lyricsJa.en: My mama don't like you and she likes everyone
lyricsJa.ja: 誰にでも優しい母さんでさえ、君のことは嫌いなんだ

lyricsJa.en: And I never like to admit that I was wrong
lyricsJa.ja: 自分が間違っていたなんて、これっぽっちも認めたくないけど

lyricsJa.en: And I've been so caught up in my job,
lyricsJa.ja: 仕事にばかり気を取られていて

lyricsJa.en: Didn't see what's going on
lyricsJa.ja: 何が起きているのか見えていなかった

lyricsJa.en: But now I know, I'm better sleeping on my own
lyricsJa.ja: でも今はわかる、一人で眠るほうがずっといいって

lyricsJa.en: 'Cause if you like the way you look that much
lyricsJa.ja: そんなに自分の見た目が好きなら

lyricsJa.en: Oh baby you should go and love yourself
lyricsJa.ja: ああ、そのまま自分だけを愛してればいい

lyricsJa.en: And if you think that I'm still holdin' on to somethin'
lyricsJa.ja: 僕がまだ何かに執着していると思っているなら

lyricsJa.en: You should go and love yourself
lyricsJa.ja: そのまま自分だけを愛してればいい

lyricsJa.en: But when you told me that you hated my friends
lyricsJa.ja: 僕の友達が嫌いだなんて君は言ったけど

lyricsJa.en: The only problem was with you and not them
lyricsJa.ja: 問題があったのは彼らじゃなく、君の方だったんだ

lyricsJa.en: And every time you told me my opinion was wrong
lyricsJa.ja: 君はいつだって僕の意見が間違っていると言って

lyricsJa.en: And tried to make me forget where I came from
lyricsJa.ja: 僕のルーツさえも忘れさせようとしたね

lyricsJa.en: And I didn't wanna write a song
lyricsJa.ja: 本当は歌なんて書きたくなかったんだ

lyricsJa.en: 'Cause I didn't want anyone thinking I still care
lyricsJa.ja: まだ君に未練があるなんて、誰にも思われたくないから

lyricsJa.en: I don't but, you still hit my phone up
lyricsJa.ja: そんなことないのに、君はまだ僕に電話してくるね

lyricsJa.en: And baby I'll be movin' on
lyricsJa.ja: だけど僕はもう、次へ進むことにしたんだ

lyricsJa.en: And I think it should be somethin'
lyricsJa.ja: これは伝えておくべきことだと思う

lyricsJa.en: That I don't wanna hold back
lyricsJa.ja: 隠さずにいたいから

lyricsJa.en: Maybe you should know that
lyricsJa.ja: 君も知っておいた方がいい

lyricsJa.en: My mama don't like you and she likes everyone
lyricsJa.ja: 誰にでも優しい母さんでさえ、君のことは嫌いなんだ

lyricsJa.en: And I never like to admit that I was wrong
lyricsJa.ja: 自分が間違っていたなんて、これっぽっちも認めたくないけど

lyricsJa.en: And I've been so caught up in my job
lyricsJa.ja: 仕事にばかり気を取られていて

lyricsJa.en: Didn't see what's going on
lyricsJa.ja: 何が起きているのか見えていなかった

lyricsJa.en: And now I know, I'm better sleeping on my own
lyricsJa.ja: 今ならわかる、一人で眠るほうがずっといいって

lyricsJa.en: 'Cause if you like the way you look that much
lyricsJa.ja: そんなに自分の見た目が好きなら

lyricsJa.en: Oh baby you should go and love yourself
lyricsJa.ja: ねえ、君は自分自身のことを愛してればいいよ

lyricsJa.en: And if you think that I'm still holdin' on to somethin'
lyricsJa.ja: もし僕がまだ君に未練があると思っているなら

lyricsJa.en: You should go and love yourself
lyricsJa.ja: 勝手に自分だけを愛していればいい

lyricsJa.en: For all the times that you made me feel small
lyricsJa.ja: 君が僕を惨めな気持ちにさせたすべての時のために

lyricsJa.en: I fell in love, now I feel nothin' at all
lyricsJa.ja: 恋に落ちたけど、今はもう何も感じないんだ

lyricsJa.en: I never felt so low when I was vulnerable
lyricsJa.ja: 心が弱っていた時、あんなに落ち込んだことはなかった

lyricsJa.en: Was I a fool to let you break down my walls?
lyricsJa.ja: 君に心の壁を壊させた僕は、馬鹿だったのかな？

lyricsJa.en: 'Cause if you like the way you look that much
lyricsJa.ja: だって、もし君が自分の見た目をそんなに気に入っているなら

lyricsJa.en: Oh baby you should go and love yourself
lyricsJa.ja: ねえ、自分自身のことを愛してればいいよ

lyricsJa.en: And if you think that I'm still holdin' on to somethin'
lyricsJa.ja: もし僕がまだ何かに執着していると思っているなら

lyricsJa.en: You should go and love yourself
lyricsJa.ja: 勝手に自分だけを愛していればいい

lyricsJa.en: 'Cause if you like the way you look that much
lyricsJa.ja: だって、もし君が自分の見た目をそんなに気に入っているなら

lyricsJa.en: Oh baby you should go and love yourself
lyricsJa.ja: ねえ、自分自身のことを愛してればいいよ

lyricsJa.en: And if you think that I'm still holdin' on to somethin'
lyricsJa.ja: もし僕がまだ何かに執着していると思っているなら

lyricsJa.en: You should go and love yourself
lyricsJa.ja: 勝手に自分だけを愛していればいい

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: How are you doing after everything with Emily?
sentences.displayHtml: How are you doing after everything with Emily?

sentences.text: I heard she's been trying to reach you.
sentences.displayHtml: I heard she's been trying to reach you.

conversation.japanese: エミリーとの件、その後どう？彼女、君に連絡しようとしてるって聞いたよ。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: Yeah, she keeps hitting my phone up.
sentences.displayHtml: Yeah, she keeps hitting my phone up.

sentences.text: It's a bit annoying, to be honest.
sentences.displayHtml: It's a bit annoying, to be honest.

conversation.japanese: うん、彼女まだしつこく電話してくるんだ。正直、ちょっと迷惑だよ。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: She always tries to make it seem like you're still holding on to something.
sentences.displayHtml: She always tries to make it seem like you're still holding on to something.

conversation.japanese: やっぱりね。彼女、君がまだ何かを引きずっているように見せようとするから。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: Well, she can think what she wants.
sentences.displayHtml: Well, she can think what she wants.

sentences.text: I'm actually movin' on quite well.
sentences.displayHtml: I'm actually movin' on quite well.

sentences.text: I've been so caught up in my job lately.
sentences.displayHtml: I've been so caught up in my job lately.

conversation.japanese: 彼女がどう思おうと勝手さ。僕は実はかなり前に進んでるよ。最近は仕事に夢中になってるしね。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: You know, sometimes you were so busy you didn't see what was going on around you.
sentences.displayHtml: You know, sometimes you were so busy you didn't see what was going on around you.

conversation.japanese: それは良かった！ねえ、時々君は忙しすぎて、周りで何が起こっているか見えてなかったよね。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: But now I know, I'm actually better sleeping on my own.
sentences.displayHtml: But now I know, I'm actually better sleeping on my own.

sentences.text: And my mama, she actually never liked her much, even though she likes everyone.
sentences.displayHtml: And my mama, she actually never liked her much, even though she likes everyone.

conversation.japanese: ああ、分かってる。でも今なら分かるよ、僕一人で寝る方がずっといいって。それに、僕のママ、普段は誰でも好きなんだけど、彼女のことは好きじゃなかったんだ。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: It sounds like you're truly over it and ready to just let her love herself.
sentences.displayHtml: It sounds like you're truly over it and ready to just let her love herself.

conversation.japanese: へえ、それはすごいことだね！本当に吹っ切れて、彼女には自分自身を愛してもらえばいいって感じだね。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: And I definitely don't feel like I'm crying on my own anymore.
sentences.displayHtml: And I definitely don't feel like I'm crying on my own anymore.

conversation.japanese: その通り。もう一人で泣いているなんて気持ちは全然ないよ。
